Ah good ol' Overwatch..
The thing what really pissed me is, how they changed quick match so much, it was fun mode because it was chaotic back then, people should be allowed to pick any heroes they want, heck they should still allow players to pick duplicate heroes, nowadays it's just ranked mode 2.0..
Also they took all the freedom players able to do in that mode, i mean there is a "serious" mode already, why implement that to the normal mode where people should be free to having fun with no consequences.
I am glad they fixed some broken mechanics, but no one asked for that change for that mode.
I swear it's now easier to get match on ranked than quick match nowadays..

author: @minendown
text: All these people talking about how the game balance and new characters drove them away don't realize that in actuality they just got tired of the game. The old Overwatch was exciting because it was new and fresh and everyone had no idea what they were doing, so there was some even ground. Objectively, the game on release was actually something of a mess, and most of those issues are gone now. The game is even on a great patch right now that undid a lot of the power creep and brought many characters back in line with their feel on release. None of that matters though because the game has matured and people play it differently.
